name: Matched-Mismatch Agent (v1)
short_description: Condition-C wrapper that walks the v2 hierarchy in phase order and substitutes deliberately incorrect granularity tags around either the t0006 ReAct delegate or the t0007 Plan-and-Solve delegate.

entry_points.name: MatchedMismatchAgent
entry_points.description: Condition-C agent that walks a v2 hierarchy and emits trajectory records carrying a deliberately wrong granularity tag.

entry_points.name: MatchedMismatchRecord
entry_points.description: Frozen dataclass whose first six fields are exactly TRAJECTORY_RECORD_FIELDS; an extras mapping carries the correct tag under _correct_granularity.

entry_points.name: AgentRunResult
entry_points.description: Aggregate output of one MatchedMismatchAgent.run call: final_answer, trajectory, phases.

entry_points.name: Phase
entry_points.description: One step of the canonical phase-ordered walk over a v2 annotation tree (kind, correct_tag, payload).

entry_points.name: iter_phases
entry_points.description: Yield Phase objects in canonical order: global, then per-subtask (subtask, atomics), then global_atomics.

entry_points.name: pick_mismatch_tag
entry_points.description: Return a granularity tag distinct from the correct tag, picked uniformly at random or per ADVERSARIAL_MAP.
